research_text: Alex Nguyen manages the brand partnership program at Cascade Commerce Group, responsible for onboarding and retaining the 200+ branded storefronts on the platform. They act as the primary contact for brand partners on IP protection concerns and feed those requirements back to the legal and platform teams. They have been tracking growing churn risk among brand partners who are frustrated with the pace of trademark enforcement on the platform. They are co-sponsoring the brand protection tooling evaluation with Robert Kline.
offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
